focusPoints.label: What they’re saying yes and no to
focusPoints.reason: Whether their current work matches the team’s bets, or if they’re drifting into reactive firefighting.

focusPoints.label: Top dependencies slowing delivery
focusPoints.reason: What’s most likely to block progress in the next two weeks, and what decisions or inputs are needed to clear it.

focusPoints.label: How well stakeholders are kept in the loop
focusPoints.reason: How clearly they’re communicating status, tradeoffs, and next steps so other teams and partners can make decisions without surprises.

focusPoints.label: Commitments and slippage transparency
focusPoints.reason: If their delivery commitments are still predictable, and whether they’re flagging slippage early enough to protect the plan.
